description: The 2016 public outcry over Mylan’s price hikes for the EpiPen, which increased costs by over 400%. The backlash forced a public health dialogue on the ethics of pharmaceutical pricing for life-saving emergency medicine.

key_events.description: Social media outrage highlights the disparity between production cost and retail price.
US Congressional committee launches an inquiry into Mylan's pricing strategy.
Mylan announces the launch of a generic version to mitigate the PR disaster.
Settlements reached in multiple consumer class-action lawsuits.

calibration_notes: Demonstrates the near-unanimous public rejection of corporate profit-taking on essential healthcare commodities.
